title: aureolaria tenuifolia var. macrophylla
intro: Aureolaria tenuifolia var. macrophylla, also known as longleaf beauty-of-the-mountain, is a flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aureolaria tenuifolia var. macrophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
